notes: raGameId 10113 matches the library entry. All 97 achievements from the ra-set source (src-ra, the public RA game page snapshot) map 1:1 to their row in the global RetroAchievements widget (target convention confirmed by Pierre 2026-07-09) — syncing RA progress ticks the achievement in that checklist. 0 unmapped, 0 flagged.
The RA API was not called; the achievement list comes from the ra-set source recorded in sources.json (per the hard rule).

The reverse links (step -> achievements, for the play-view badges) live in the spine's achievementRefs; this pass provides the forward links (achievement -> guide item) for Sync. The two flagged spine step placements (Plenty of Hearts; Blind Explorer/Cartographer) do not affect this mapping, which targets the checklist rows.
